$comment: Built-in Asset Library pack. BuiltinLibraryProvider reads this file; each entry's `dir` is the folder under public/library/ and `manifest.files` are copied into a project on insert (preview is a thumbnail only, not copied). Licenses are white-listed (CC0/OFL/MIT/CC-BY).

manifest.name: Library Sprite
manifest.description: A simple Sprite2D prefab referencing a bundled texture. Drag into the scene to instantiate.

manifest.name: Rounded Panel
manifest.description: A 64x64 panel texture. Drag into the scene to create a Sprite2D.
